description: A horizontal candid photograph with no overlaid graphic text, slogans, or agency seals. It depicts two people riding in a small open red parade vehicle (a miniature/antique-style fire-truck or parade car) down a city street, evidently in a parade. The vehicle and its surroundings are decorated with numerous small American flags. The man at left is driving, gripping a steering wheel, wearing a ball cap with a subdued/thin-blue-line American flag patch, sunglasses pushed up, and a gray t-shirt reading 'Team...' (partially visible). The woman at right (resembling DOL/administration leadership doing a public appearance) wears aviator sunglasses and a light blue button-down shirt with a small lapel pin, smiling and waving with her right hand raised. The urban backdrop includes a marquee reading 'WARNE' (the historic Warner Theatre) and tall buildings. This is a candid event/parade photo for the Labor Day weekend (per the tweet), not a designed meme. The only text is on signage and apparel in the scene. Target audience: working Americans, projecting patriotism and a celebratory Labor Day tone.
notable_text: WARNE(R) theatre marquee; (cap) thin-blue-line flag; t-shirt 'Team...' (no overlaid graphic text)
